node.text: Jolene owns a pet named Seraphim, who brings comfort and cheer to her life.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "buy snake Seraphim") on Session 13 (Score: 0.90)

node.text: Jolene has a snake as a pet, finds it calming, and a great connection with nature.
Jolene had a 'snake adventure' where her snake got out, but she found her snuggling under the bed after hours of searching.
